expected_path_note: exclusion_check=Yes (purely receiving funds, no own engagement) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 14 – Sister Receiving Transfers From Contractor Sibling
activities: Elena Petrova is a schoolteacher in Zurich. Her account receives regular family support transfers from her brother, who owns a construction company active on government projects abroad. She has no role in, claim on, or business dealings with her brother's company; the file records her own income as her teaching salary and the purpose of the account as private savings and the family transfers.
origin_of_assets: Teaching salary and family gifts from her brother.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Savings and a share in an apartment.
